Class AbstractWriter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractWriter
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExecutionNodeWriter, SymbolicLayoutWriter
public abstract class AbstractWriter extends Object
Provides the basic functionality for classes like ExecutionNodeWriter and SymbolicLayoutWriter which encodes an object structure as XML.

  • Method Details

    • appendEmptyTag

      protected void appendEmptyTag(int level, String tagName, Map<String,String> attributeValues, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends an empty tag to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level.
      tagName - The tag name.
      attributeValues - The attributes.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendStartTag

      protected void appendStartTag(int level, String tagName, Map<String,String> attributeValues, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends a start tag to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level.
      tagName - The tag name.
      attributeValues - The attributes.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendEndTag

      protected void appendEndTag(int level, String tagName, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends an end tag to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level.
      tagName - The tag name.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendWhiteSpace

      protected void appendWhiteSpace(int level, StringBuilder sb)
      Adds leading white space to the StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level in the tree used for leading white space (formatting).
      sb - The StringBuilder to write to.

    • appendAttribute

      protected void appendAttribute(String attributeName, String value, StringBuilder sb)
      Adds an XML attribute to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      attributeName - The attribute name.
      value - The attribute value.
      sb - The StringBuilder to write to.

    • appendXmlHeader

      protected void appendXmlHeader(String encoding, StringBuilder sb)
      Adds an XML header to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      sb - The StringBuilder to write to.

    • appendNewLine

      protected void appendNewLine(StringBuilder sb)
      Adds a line break to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      sb - The StringBuilder to write to.
